results.title: Special Story: BSNL Launches Satellite Phone That Works Without Mobile Network, Priced at ₹1.34 Lakh
results.description: #ଟ ାୱାର_ଟେନସନ_ଗଲା #ଯ େଉଁଠି_ଥିଲେ_ବି_ଲାଗିବ_ଫୋନ BSNL ଆଣିଲା ଦମଦାର ଫେନ୍ । ବିନା ନେଟୱର୍କରେ ଚାଲିବ ମୋବାଇଲ୍ । ଅପହଞ୍ଚ ଉଲାକାରେ ବି ହେବନି କୌଣସି ଅସୁବିଧା । ଭାରତରେ ଯୋଗାଯୋଗ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥାକୁ ଆହୁରି ସୁଦୃଢ଼ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ସରକାରୀ ଟେଲିକମ୍ କମ୍ପାନୀ BSNL ଏକ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ସାଟେଲାଇଟ୍ ଫୋନ୍ ଲଞ୍ଚ କରିଛି । BSNL has launched a new Satellite Phone in India to ensure communication even in areas without mobile network coverage. Unlike conventional smartphones, the handset connects directly to satellites instead of cellular towers, making it suitable for remote locations and emergency situations. The device is priced at ₹1,34,166. #TechnologyNews_BSNL #BSNL_SatellitePhone #IndiaTelecom #TechNewsIndia #SatelliteCommunication #EmergencyConnectivity #RemoteAreas #4GExpansion #BSNLSatellitePhone_India #SatelliteConnectivity_BSNL #BSNL4GExpansion_India #OdishaTV #Specialstory #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel.
